name.description: Base name for all resources created by this module

vpc_id.description: ID of the VPC in which to create resources

public_subnet_ids.description: List of public subnet IDs for the internet-facing Application Load Balancer

private_subnet_ids.description: List of private subnet IDs for the ECS tasks (tasks must not be directly reachable from the internet)

cluster_arn.description: ARN of the ECS cluster on which to run the service

container_definitions.description: JSON-encoded list of container definitions for the ECS task

container_name.description: Name of the container within the task definition that receives traffic from the load balancer

certificate_arn.description: ARN of the ACM certificate to attach to the HTTPS listeners (port 443 and 8443)

execution_role_arn.description: ARN of the IAM role that grants the ECS container agent permission to pull images and publish logs

task_role_arn.description: ARN of the IAM role assumed by the running task (leave empty if not needed)

task_cpu.description: CPU units to allocate for the task (required for FARGATE; e.g. 256, 512, 1024)

task_memory.description: Memory (MiB) to allocate for the task (required for FARGATE; e.g. 512, 1024, 2048)

launch_type.description: ECS launch type: FARGATE or EC2

platform_version.description: Fargate platform version (only used when launch_type is FARGATE)

cpu_architecture.description: CPU architecture for the Fargate runtime platform (X86_64 or ARM64)

operating_system_family.description: Operating system family for the Fargate runtime platform (e.g. LINUX)

desired_count.description: Desired number of task instances to run

health_check_grace_period_seconds.description: Seconds to ignore failing load balancer health checks after a task starts

wait_for_steady_state.description: Whether Terraform should wait for the ECS service to reach a steady state before completing

ssl_policy.description: SSL/TLS security policy for the HTTPS listeners. Use a modern policy to enforce TLS 1.2+

enable_deletion_protection.description: If true, prevents deletion of the ALB via the AWS console/API (recommended for production)

alb_idle_timeout.description: ALB idle connection timeout in seconds

alb_access_logs_bucket.description: S3 bucket name to store ALB access logs (leave empty to disable access logging)

alb_access_logs_prefix.description: S3 key prefix for ALB access logs

deregistration_delay.description: Seconds for the load balancer to wait before deregistering a target

health_check_path.description: HTTP path used for ALB target group health checks

health_check_healthy_threshold.description: Number of consecutive successful health checks before a target is considered healthy

health_check_unhealthy_threshold.description: Number of consecutive failed health checks before a target is considered unhealthy

health_check_timeout.description: Seconds before a health check request times out

health_check_matcher.description: HTTP status codes (or range) to treat as healthy (e.g. "200" or "200-299")

tags.description: Map of tags to apply to all resources
